name: memory_categorize
description: Routes a fact to an existing category or creates a new one, linking via a part_of edge. LLM-driven; taxonomy stays emergent.

inputs.name: fact_id
inputs.description: if set, add part_of edge from fact to category

outputs.name: new
outputs.description: true if a new category was created

summary_md: LLM-maintained taxonomy router. Single-fact and batch modes. Spec: MEMORY_ARCHITECTURE.md §4.
